mentions.note: Huge winner for the charitable trust; sold some at $310 but let it run to $400 without trimming. Lost discipline. Down 12%+ today. Should have exited more aggressively. Lesson: trim parabolic winners even when hypnotized by gains—take 'little schnitle' off table.
